title: Translations. -My Faith. (From Schiller.)
content:
In these epigrams I have altered the form, which in the original is the elegiac distich.



    Which religion I profess?
     None of which you mention make.
    Wherefore so?--And can't you guess?
     For Religion's sake.
meaning:
"Translations. -My Faith. (From Schiller.)" is a quintessential example of George MacDonald's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
